description: A message that supports a sense of choice, control and ownership over one's own work and decisions, rather than feeling controlled or overridden by others.
A message that supports a sense of being capable, skilled and able to succeed at one's tasks, reducing fear of failure or negative judgment.
A message that supports a sense of connection, belonging and being seen by colleagues, reducing isolation and lack of recognition.
A message that acknowledges and reinforces an already positive experience, encouraging the person to keep going without implying anything is wrong.
A neutral, general check-in message used when no clear emotional signal was detected.
